steps.title: Name the two angle types
steps.content: With two parallel lines and a transversal, all four acute angles are equal and all four obtuse angles are equal. If one angle is $8x-260$, its supplement is $$180-(8x-260)=440-8x$$

steps.title: Compare the remaining sums
steps.content: The other two possible sums are $$(8x-260)+3(440-8x)=1{,}060-16x$$ $$4(440-8x)=1{,}760-32x$$ The expression $-16x+1{,}560$ is not on this list. The answer is A.
